title: SMPTeams
description: A powerful team plugin with bank system, GUI menus, friendly-fire control, chunk claiming, protections, team homes, banning system, and economy integration. Perfect for SMP servers.
body:
⭐ SMPTeams – The Ultimate Team & Claim System for SMP Servers

SMPTeams is an advanced, fully-customizable team system designed for survival and economy-based servers.
It brings everything a modern SMP needs:

🎯 Main Features
🛡️ Team System

Create and manage teams

Invite / accept members

Give admin roles

Transfer ownership

Ban members from the team

Unban with /team pardon

Leave or delete teams

Full tab-completion for every command

Clean GUI for banks

💰 Team Bank (GUI Included)

Deposit and withdraw money

Requires the player to type the amount in chat

Safe validation (no negative numbers, no invalid input)

Economy support via Vault

🏠 Team Home

/team sethome and /team delhome

Team home shows in /home list (compatible with EssentialsX)

Only admins and the team creator can manage it

🚫 Friendly Fire Control

Members of the same team cannot damage each other

Automatically handled with an event listener

🗺️ Chunk Claim System (Advanced)

Claim chunks with /team claim

Unclaim with /team claim del

Claims must touch each other (no claims scattered everywhere)

Fully protected:

No opening storage blocks

No interacting with buttons, levers, doors, etc.

But villagers are always interactable

Impossible to claim a chunk already owned by another team

📈 Exponential Claim Cost

First claim price configurable:
claim-base-price: 1000.0

Exponential multiplier configurable:
claim-price-multiplier: 1.5

Final price formula:
price = base * multiplier^(number_of_claims)

Limits per team configurable

Automatically adapts to config changes

🧾 Fully Saved Data

All team:

members

roles

bank

home

banned players

claims

…are saved and restored at server restart.

🔧 Performance & Compatibility

Works on Paper 1.21.x

Uses Vault for economy

100% compatible with EssentialsX locations + homes

Zero TPS impact

Efficient chunk-protection system

🧪 Perfect For

Survival SMP

Factions-like servers without land destruction

Economy-based servers

Small to large communities

📦 SUMMARY (résumé)
Advanced team manager with bank GUI, chunk claims, protections, roles, bans, exponential claim pricing, economy support, and EssentialsX compatibility. Perfect for SMP servers.
🏷️ TAGS RECOMMANDÉS

Teams

Protection

Claims

SMP

Economy

Vault

Land Protection

Survival

Paper

1.20 / 1.21
